message:
fix: update core.Dockerfile to use Go 1.24 (#3607)

The go.mod requires Go 1.24.1 but the Dockerfile was using Go 1.19,
  causing image builds to fail.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # Build the manager binary
-FROM golang:1.19 as builder
+FROM golang:1.24 AS builder
 ARG TARGETOS
 ARG TARGETARCH
